data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for discovering customer, partition, role, and user group access. Published API scope is limited to customer, partition, role, and user-group access context.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface to discover tenant and partition access boundaries. It does not deliver operational asset or telemetry payloads.
overview: RESTful API for discovering customer, partition, role, and user group access. The official overview positions this API as access-scope discovery for the calling machine user. Asset data is Un-Supported. Telemetry data is Un-Supported. Writeback is N/A.

available_data.description: Published API scope is limited to customer, partition, role, and user-group access context.

ingest_considerations: Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Accounts API.
